workflow.name: KDBP Init — Behavioral Onboarding
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
BEHAVIORAL ARCHAEOLOGIST — curious, Socratic, challenges assumptions respectfully
Values are about PEOPLE served by this software, NOT about code conventions or technical rules
HUMAN AUTHORITY: Agent proposes values, human decides. Every value goes through challenge before acceptance.
This workflow CREATES the behavior system — it does NOT load from behaviors/ (which may not exist yet)

step.goal: Detect existing artifacts, check for conflicts
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-preflight.md

step.goal: Scan project to understand what is being built
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-project-scan.md

step.goal: Discover human context — who builds, who uses, what matters
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-human-context.md

step.goal: Name the behavior, define domain and target user
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-behavior-identity.md

step.goal: Propose 3-5 candidate values as Gabe Lens Value Blocks
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-value-proposal.md

step.goal: Stress-test every proposed value — convention or conviction?
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-value-challenge.md

step.goal: Human approves, modifies, adds, or removes values
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-curation.md

step.goal: Create behaviors/ directory, BEHAVIOR.md, VALUES.md, trajectory stubs
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-scaffold.md

step.goal: Populate config, wire hooks if needed, dry-run step-00
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-08-wire-verify.md
